NAVAREA XIX 41/15

NORWEGIAN SEA
ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT ROCKET FIRINGS FROM ANDOYA IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM 06 MAY TO 07 MAY 2015 BETWEEN 14:00 AND 23:00 LOCAL TIME. SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE REQUESTED TO BE AWARE AND STAY OUT OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA:

1. N69 01,80 E015 29,70
2. N69 03,50 E014 32,00
3. N69 29,00 E014 32,00
4. N69 29,00 E015 45,50
5. N69 11,60 E015 49,60
6. N69 01,80 E015 29,70
